title: THE MAN
lyrics:
Distant signals across a frozen plain
We move like shadows, we carry the name
A silent ledger, pages full of rust
The man who left us, turned our world to dust

He whispered codes beneath the northern stars
Slowly unmade the borders, rewrote our scars
In the quiet archives, truth bends and folds
We learn what we were and what we sold
notes: Ejemplo de canción. Editar /data/songs.json para añadir más entradas.
